name: lgtm
description: Human approval for agent work, with code diff and Markdown review.

interface.shortDescription: Review agent work with human approval
interface.longDescription: Open a local browser checkpoint to review local or SSH-hosted code changes and Markdown, leave contextual comments, and approve agent work.
defaultPrompt: Use lgtm to present this work for human review.
Open an lgtm review for the current local or SSH-hosted Git changes.
